intent: Single-screen first step of a KFZ tariff calculator capturing vehicle identification, registration date, holder postal code, annual mileage and user-circle.
notes: Tier-1 insurance baseline: vehicle-data step of a multi-step KFZ-Versicherung wizard. Five free-text inputs with strict format validations (HSN length 4 numeric, TSN length 3 alphanumeric uppercase, ISO date with upper bound today, PLZ length 5 numeric, annual mileage with both lower and upper bound) plus one SELECT_FIELD for Nutzerkreis. Anchors the lower bound for tariff/quote-style entry forms with character-class validations and bounded numeric ranges.
